action.description: May support release replacement devices under a warranty exception?

context.action_boundary: May support release replacement devices under a warranty exception?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad service exception exists, but release authority depends on device class and claim channel.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Replacement release REL-PER-044 ships 12 class-B monitors through clinical claims channel for reason field-failure cluster.
Exception approval EXC-PER-044 covers class-B monitors through retail returns channel, quantity up to 15, reason field-failure cluster, before replacement shipment.
Service memo says general service exceptions cannot replace claim-channel exception approval.

policy_documents.content: Warranty exception release is complete only when exception approval matches device class, claim channel, quantity, and release reason before replacement shipment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
